hyperedges.label: Core Triad: every platform depends on Coordinator, BaseEntity, and CoordinatorData
Platform Pattern: Description dataclass + tuple + entity class + async_setup_entry
Translation sync: strings.json + en.json + it.json must stay in sync

hyperedges.label: Core Triad: every platform depends on Coordinator, BaseEntity, and CoordinatorData
Platform Pattern: Description dataclass + tuple + entity class + async_setup_entry
Translation sync: strings.json + en.json + it.json must stay in sync
